description_long: This is a tall, narrow shelving unit constructed primarily from weathered wood with a rustic, industrial appearance. The frame is reinforced with dark metal brackets and bolts at the corners, giving it a sturdy and robust look. The unit features four open shelves, each made from the same aged wood as the frame, providing ample space for storage or display. The sides are open, with no panels or backing, allowing visibility and access from multiple angles. The wood grain and surface imperfections are clearly visible, adding to its rugged, utilitarian charm. This type of shelving is well-suited for use in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or outdoor patios.
description: A tall, narrow, open-shelved unit made of weathered wood and reinforced with dark metal brackets, featuring four spacious shelves and a rustic, industrial look.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four open wooden shelves and the metal-reinforced frame.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow depth of the unit and the open, unobstructed shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, displaying the open shelves and frame structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the narrow profile and open shelving.
